free_text: Pb-206 states homologous to the 1.484 MeV, 11/2- state
of Tl-205.
Department of Physics
Physical Section
Physical Institute
Details of
experiment.
A Bi-209 target, thickness 40 mu-g/cm**2 on a carbon
backing of 16 mu-g/cm**2 thickness, was  used.
The energy calibration was performed using a
50-mu-g/cm**2 Pb-208 target on a 18 mu-g/cm**2 carbon
backing.
.Distorted-wave born approximation theory.
Optical model parameters.
Levels, spin, parity.
Proposed scheme of weak-coupled states of the H9/2
proton with the one-proton-hole-two-neutron-hole states
excited in the Tl-205 core.
A quadrupole-dipole-dipole magnetic
spectrograph. The light-ion focal plane detector with
periodic readout.
The Garching HVEC MP tandem accelerator.
*EN-RSL. The overall energy resolution was about 12-
keV,resulting from the target energy loss.
Data-point reader uncertainty.
By CAJAD from fig.2,3 of PR/C,49,2784,1994
Last checking has been done.
